artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for layered representation theorem architecture

partial_progress.details: Phases 1-5, 9-10 completed (axioms, soundness, derivability, module organization). Phases 6-8 partial: key lemmas proven but full DenselyOrdered instance and dense completeness need constrained Lindenbaum construction.

completion_data.completion_summary: Established layered representation theorem architecture: DN/DF axioms, DP derivation, dense/discrete soundness, key density lemmas. Full dense completeness needs constrained Lindenbaum construction.
